qas.a: Withdrawal/Reinstatement of Authority to Bear Arms

qas.q: What is needed to arm Air Crew?

qas.a: Every shift change (3 times per day)

qas.q: Verbal do not arm issued up to 72 hours is issued by who?
Who gives authority to Do Not Arm?
What is done If alarm does not arm or power is out
qas.a: Armed guard will secure until problem is solved

qas.q: What is done for temporarily storing transient weapons?
qas.a: Fill out 1297, update pass on book

qas.q: Civilian weapons can be stored when...
qas.a: Extreme circumstances; threats of suicide / harm of others
The US Air Force Mishap Prevention Program

qas.q: If emergency occurs(eval of some sort) what is done after emergency?
qas.a: Complete inventory check of armory; Keys, weapons, ammo equipment
